prompt: Ultra-realistic documentary portrait of a master baker, male, approximately 55 years old, Swiss-German heritage, wearing a traditional white apron dusted with flour, sleeves rolled up revealing strong forearms with flour-covered hands. He is gently scoring a raw sourdough loaf on a wooden peel, with intense focus and craftsmanship visible in his expression. A warm amber glow from an old stone oven in the background. The bakery is rustic — stone walls, antique wooden shelves with proofing baskets, iron hooks. 85mm lens, f/2.0, ISO 200. Natural ambient light from oven glow and small window. Visible pores, natural skin texture, slight flour on eyebrows, salt-and-pepper stubble. No retouching, no beauty filters. Authentic master craftsman energy. Documentary realism, editorial style.
negative_prompt: young, plastic skin, airbrushed, overly clean, studio backdrop, posed, stock photo, generic, artificial lighting, cartoon, CGI, overexposed, beauty filter, smooth skin, no wrinkles

settings.lighting: warm oven ambient glow, soft window side light
settings.depth_of_field: shallow, face and hands sharp, background softly bokeh
settings.quality: high detail, authentic skin texture, flour imperfections
